title: Bundles Tweaks by Ane
description: A mod to improve the budles making them more usefull
body:
# Bundles Tweaks by Ane

Bundles Tweaks is a small mod that changes the weight of the non-stackable items and stackable items by 16, to the same weight of stackable items by 64. So now for example you can have a bundle with an armor and a sword, instead of a bundle with only one of this items, or a bundle with 64 ender pearls.
